name: Three Circles Relaunch 2026
summary: A relaunch-focused edition of the Three Circles website emphasizing premium positioning, clearer trust flow, and stronger inquiry conversion.
deliveryStory: We rebuilt the digital experience around conversion-first content architecture and production-grade launch gates.
process: Discovery workshop, conversion diagnosis, and content model definition
Wireframe and visual system decisions aligned to premium positioning
Build, integration, QA gates, and staged launch
challenge: The previous site underrepresented brand quality.
Proof and inquiry path were not strategically placed.
strategy: Rebuilt information hierarchy around trust and service clarity.
Improved visual rhythm, CTA sequencing, and proof placement.
Prepared reusable CMS-driven sections for faster updates.
integrations: Analytics events for CTA and form actions
seo: Intent-aligned metadata and social snippet coverage
Semantic heading system and internal linking structure
Optimized media text and alt governance
standards: Responsive QA across mobile, tablet, and desktop
Accessibility checks for labels, focus, and contrast
Performance-safe media sizing and layout stability

build.label: Scope
build.hint: Service pages, proof blocks, conversion flow
